description: Reviewer flags a blocker criticism targeting a specific claim. Routing must promote that claim to 'blocking' severity regardless of its verification verdict.

input.question: Will the referenced event occur by 2027-12-31?

reviews.reviewProse: Single blocker — claim about the resolving source needs a specific timestamp field on the feed URL, without which the market can be manipulated by editorial choice.

rubricVotes.rationale: Feed needs a timestamped publication field.

criticisms.rationale: Feed URL is homepage-level; pin to a specific endpoint with a canonical timestamp.
